title: Evissa
description: A comprehensive HOA management system that handles payments, reservations, identity signups, and financial reporting.
longDescription: Evissa is designed to streamline Homeowners Association activities. It features a robust payment gateway, a booking system for common areas, identity verification for residents, and automated financial status exports. The platform also handles voucher requests and all administrative HOA tasks in one centralized location.

title: ERP Hardware System
description: Specific hardware shop ERP with POS, inventory management, and multi-role dashboards.
longDescription: A multi-faceted ERP system tailored for hardware retail. Includes a POS terminal for cashiers, an owner's dashboard for financial and inventory oversight, and a warehouse manager view for restocking and delivery tracking. It also features a driver app for navigation and delivery management.

title: Alpha Interior
description: Portfolio page for a Bahrain-based workshop showcasing skills, artistry, and inquiry management.
longDescription: A visual-heavy portfolio for Alpha Interior, a workshop in Bahrain. The site focuses on high-quality gallery presentations of their craftsmanship and an integrated inquiry system that routes potential client requests directly to the administration for quoting.

title: FlowState
description: Project management system for developers with Git integration and collaborative tracking.
longDescription: FlowState aids developer collaboration with a user-friendly UI for task tracking. It integrates directly with GitHub, allowing teams to manage organizations, repositories, and branches through CRUD operations within the app itself.
